message:
fix(rpc): reject nested batch operations to prevent stack overflow (bd-4)

handleBatch calls handleRequest for each sub-operation, and handleRequest
routes OpBatch back to handleBatch. This creates unbounded recursion that
a single malicious request can exploit to crash the daemon via stack overflow.

Reject OpBatch inside batch sub-operations upfront since there is no
legitimate use case for nested batches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/opal
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
